findings.title: Current live/raw state does not support reopening on status truth alone
findings.detail: Status is green/clear, but rotation evidence remains insufficient and accounts still show no reserve posture.

findings.title: Alias drift exists between stage20_c6, step42, and latest raw state
findings.detail: The hold packet must distinguish active current blockers from historical/inherited labels that are now clear in latest status.

findings.title: Reopen conditions must be packet/state changes rather than narrative milestones
findings.detail: The first admissible reopen point is conditioned on observable reserve posture, rotation evidence, and contradiction resolution.

wording_risks.detail: Do not soften the hold by leaning on latest green status alone.
Do not collapse CLAIM_GATE_BLOCKED, INSUFFICIENT_ELIGIBLE_POOL, and NO_EXPLICIT_RESERVE_POSTURE into a generic 'blocker fixed' narrative.
